review_title: Adzviser is the Supermetrics Replacement We've Been Looking For
description: We’re extremely pleased to have finally found a solid replacement for Supermetrics. Adzviser delivers the same essential functionality at a much better price point, with far superior customer support. The added bonus of a ChatGPT connector allows for seamless data analysis in a way that enhances workflow efficiency. While it’s still growing, the speed of improvements and commitment to fixing issues make it a highly promising tool for digital marketing data reporting.
author: Ryan W.
pros: Adzviser has been a fantastic tool for gathering digital marketing data for our reports. Their customer support stands out as one of the biggest advantages—quick to respond, always improving the product, and genuinely helpful. Compared to Supermetrics, where support was often lackluster, Adzviser has been a refreshing change. Pricing is another major win. With Adzviser, the Looker and Google Sheets connectors are included in the price, which is significantly lower than Supermetrics. The cost structure is much more reasonable, especially when considering our Supermetrics’ legacy plan required costly add-ons, such as paying several hundred dollars just to access an extra connector like TikTok.
cons: Only con is its an up and comer, so there are occasional bugs or slow loading reports. But it's no more frequent than what we experienced with Supermetrics, and things get fixed way faster.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Cost-Effective Alternative with Exceptional Support
description: I've been using Adzviser for two weeks to integrate marketing data into Google Sheets. I switched from Supermetrics due to its cost and found Adzviser through ChatGPT. The setup was straightforward, and support was prompt. Key features include client-specific data setups and a user-friendly interface. Its pricing and competitive support make it worthwhile. As a young company, it's improving in documentation, but I highly recommend it with a 10 out of 10.
author: Jared L.
pros: I appreciate Adzviser's per-client workspace setup, which simplifies organizing data sources compared to setting them up via channels. The Google Sheets interface is user-friendly and efficient, working straight out of the box, enhancing my workflow. I highly value the daily data refresh, which saves time and lets me focus on analyzing data for better client outcomes. The customer support is excellent and responsive, addressing my issues swiftly. The pricing is competitive and scales nicely with business growth, which is crucial for me.
cons: I encountered some issues with specific use cases, which required back and forth with the support team. Although the issues were resolved within three to four days, the process needed their assistance. As they grow I'm sure a lot of use cases causing errors now get smoothed out so I have confidence in the platform in the future.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Turned my weekly reporting into a 10-minute conversation
description: Overall it's been a genuinely useful addition to how I run both businesses. Setup was straightforward, the data has been reliable, and the MCP-to-Claude workflow has changed how often I actually engage with my numbers — reporting went from a weekly chore to a real-time conversation. Support has been quick to respond when I've had questions. For a solo ecom operator plus agency owner juggling multiple accounts, it's become one of the tools I'd struggle to give up.
author: Umberto V.
pros: The MCP integration is what makes Adzviser stand out. I run a Shopify store and a marketing agency, and being able to pull live data from Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4, Shopify, and Klaviyo directly into Claude has replaced hours of weekly dashboard hopping. Instead of exporting CSVs or building reports from scratch, I ask questions in plain English and get answers back against my real account data in seconds. For the price, the breadth of platform coverage and the AI workflow it enables is hard to beat — I haven't found another tool that fits this cleanly into an AI-first reporting process.
cons: Honestly, nothing worth flagging at this stage. It's done what I needed it to do, and when I've had questions the team has been responsive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

The real game-changer is being able to chat with ChatGPT that has direct access to GA4, Meta, and more. It’s unbelievably helpful for quick analysis, debugging, and decision-making. Also, having [sensitive content hidden] involved directly makes everything smooth, fast answers, real support, and a clear product vision.
cons: Honestly, everything is working great. No cons so far. Just excited to see more features roll out over time.

review_title: ​Adzviser Simplifies Marketing Data Management for My Small Business​
description: Very positive. The product has a lot of features, automation, and is very affordable. It supports unlimited connections to multiple accounts across all data sources without additional costs. I get a lot of value from the app. Support for the product is also amazing. I get same day (sometimes immediate) response and resolution for all of my support requests.
author: Ben C.
pros: ​I've been using Adzviser to automatically sync my marketing data, and it's been a real time-saver. Instead of manually transferring data between platforms, Adzviser handles it seamlessly, ensuring I always have the latest information.​I love the ability to sync data from multiple sources into a single spreadsheet. I can import my marketing / ad data directly into Google Sheets. This integration simplifies data analysis on a daily basis without my having to copy and paste reports. I also started to use Looker report templates which created great looking reports for clients. All this for a very low, affordable fee.
cons: There's no price tier between sync'ing 3 data sources and 10.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

cons: The UI gets clunky with long account lists. You also can't connect multiple accounts at once, so onboarding takes a while if you have a lot of them.

review_title: Adzviser helps bridge the gaps between multiple ad platforms
description: Adzviser helps bridge the gaps between multiple ad platforms. Since we run campaigns across many channels, it’s much easier to connect everything in one place and use AI (like Claude) to review overall performance and make faster, data-driven decisions.
author: Elaine C.
pros: If you’re not yet using AI tools like Claude or ChatGPT, you’re missing out. Adzviser makes it incredibly easy to connect all your ad platforms in one place, allowing AI to uncover issues and insights that might otherwise go unnoticed. It helps surface what’s going wrong, highlights opportunities, and provides clear analysis to improve performance.
cons: Some of the documentation is outdated, which can make setup and troubleshooting more challenging. Updating it would greatly improve the user experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Promising platform with powerful insights, but needs greater data accuracy
description: Adzviser is a promising platform with a solid concept for digital marketing insights. The interface is user-friendly, and it provides helpful analytics to guide advertising strategies effectively. However, I noticed occasional inconsistencies in the data provided, sometimes reflecting insights not based on our historical data. This issue could be problematic if reports aren’t double-checked thoroughly. Nonetheless, the platform’s potential is clear, and with improved data accuracy, it could be an invaluable tool for marketers.
author: Freddie A.
pros: My favourite part of Adzviser is its intuitive and forward-thinking approach to digital marketing insights. The platform is easy to navigate, making it simple to generate and understand analytics that can genuinely enhance our advertising strategies. It feels like a step in the right direction for data-driven decision-making.
cons: My least favourite part of Adzviser is the occasional inaccuracy in its data. While the platform offers excellent insights, it sometimes generates information that doesn’t align with our historical data, which can lead to misleading conclusions if not caught in time. This aspect requires an extra layer of vigilance to verify report accuracy, which somewhat impacts efficiency.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Hours of Manually Exporting & Importing Data Eliminated Thanks to Adzviser
description: Goo, the founder of Adzviser, is very responsive to any inquiries that I have had. He is very personable and I think he's built a great software product. The fees are reasonable, especially when you count how many hours we save by using Adzviser instead of doing that work manually.
author: George K.
pros: Adzviser eliminates hours of tediously exporting data from ad accounts and importing it into ChatGPT manually. That's all automatic now with the realtime connection to the ad accounts! I really like that there are connectors to all the major ad platforms, so it's a comprehensive tool that meets my agency's needs.
cons: My only complaint about Adzviser is that I sometimes have to confirm which ad account I want to pull the data from. I understand that it's an extra step to ensure the accuracy of which account the data is being pulled from.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
